title: Digital Ecosystem
description: Website about the Digital Ecosystem in Continuous Teacher Training

title: World Explorer
description: Professional application built with React + TypeScript + TailwindCSS that allows you to explore information about all countries in the world using the REST Countries API.

title: MAC Museum
description: Interactive website inspired by a Contemporary Art Museum, designed to offer a dynamic visual experience using GSAP and Chakra UI.

title: Books REST API
description: A REST API built with Node.js and Express that implements JWT authentication and cookie-based session management. The project uses PostgreSQL as the database and EJS as the template engine.

title: FAST FOOD REST API
description: RESTful API for FAST FOOD management built with Node.js and Express that implements JWT authentication and cookie-based session management. The project uses MySQL as the database.
